nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Meliphaga
nodes.summary: Meliphaga（Meliphaga）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联17种鸟类，如Puff-backed honeyeater、Yellow-spotted honeyeater、Lewin's honeyeater等17种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-lined honeyeater
nodes.summary: The white-lined honeyeater (Meliphaga albilineata) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to northern Australia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It formerly included the Kimberley honeyeater as a subspecies. References
nodes.shortSummary: The white-lined honeyeater (Meliphaga albilineata) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to northern Australia.

nodes.name: White-lined honeyeater
nodes.summary: White-lined honeyeater（Meliphaga albilineata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-lined honeyeater。
